jobs.name: robert_half
jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer III
jobs.description: Engineering an enterprise-scale component library of 140+ high-performance, customer-facing web components with 300+ variants — integrating complex third-party APIs and driving cross-team implementation, standardizing UI across 20+ global production sites. Leading the migration of core codebases from GitLab to GitHub and Jenkins to GitHub Actions, automating CI/CD pipelines now adopted across multiple teams. Architecting and deploying secure, serverless AWS APIs using CDK, Lambda, API Gateway, and S3, serving as the team's primary resource for cloud infrastructure. Improving website performance by optimizing bundle sizes, CSS delivery, critical rendering path, and JavaScript execution, achieving measurable gains in Core Web Vitals and Lighthouse scores. Reducing production bugs by leading the implementation of Chromatic automated visual regression testing, improving confidence in UI changes across 140+ components.

jobs.name: buzzable
jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer
jobs.description: Spearheaded the development of core product features, resulting in a 20% boost in user acquisition through cross-functional collaboration with product and business teams. Designed foundational REST API endpoints, establishing the core backend infrastructure during the company’s early stages to support initial user scaling.

jobs.name: fanmire

jobs.description: Architected a unified newsfeed application that aggregates real-time data from Twitter, Facebook, and Instagram APIs, providing users with a centralized view across all major social platforms.
